profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage your account details and security settings.
profile.identity_description: Update your display name while the email remains the central identifier.
profile.password_description: Set a new strong password for your account.
profile.delete_description: This action is permanent. Save anything you still need before deleting the account.
profile.info_banner: This surface is for self-service only. Identity validation, persistence, password hashing, and audit logging still happen on the SSO server.
